2022October 31, 2022

🇯🇵 Hamamatsu, Japan

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Hamamatsu, Japan, October 31, 2022 -- November 4, 2022

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2022-11-hamamatsu-japan

19 Resolutions

1113Plenary
Terminate inactive liaison relationships
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to coordinate with ISO/CS and terminate the following liaison relationships: |=== |REFERENCE |TITLE |ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 31 |Automatic identification and data captu...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1112Plenary
Appoint and recognize liaison representatives for 2022-2025
SC 4 appoints and recognizes the following individuals. The appointments are for a three-year term [2022-2025]: |=== |Liaison Organization |Appointment |ISO/IEC JTC 1 |Christophe Mouton |ISO/IEC JT...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1111Plenary
Initiate project to develop ISO 29002
SC 4 resolves to initiate a project to develop ISO 29002 (Industrial automation systems and integration -- Exchange of characteristic data). This project has no change in scope from the project 785...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1110Plenary
Initiate a Committee Internal Ballot for ISO 8000-3
SC 4 resolves to initiate a CIB that asks the following questions to the members of SC 4: 1) Do you approve adding a preliminary work item "ISO/PWI 8000-3, Data quality -- Part 3: Information and d...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1109Plenary
Adjust the standards development track of ISO 10303 modules
SC 4 resolves to adjust the standards development track of the following ISO 10303 modules to SDT 36: * ISO/AWI TS 10303-1848 (ed.1- id.81490), "Annotated 3d model data quality criteria" * ISO/AWI ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1108Plenary
Cancel the ISO 15926-14 DTR project
SC 4 will request ISO CS to cancel the ISO 15926-14 DTR project.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1107Plenary
Create WG 25 ISO CDD Validation Team
SC 4 approves the creation of the WG 25 with the title "ISO CDD Validation Team" under the structure of ISO/TC 184/SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1106Plenary
Disband AHG 2 and launch NDES TR publication ballot
SC 4 accepts the draft technical report and requests its Committee manager to launch a DTR ballot.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1105Plenary
Move ISO 14306 to a multipart standard
SC 4 accepts the recommendation of JWG 16 and requests its Committee Manager coordinate with ISO/CS and designate project id. 85802 as ISO/PWI 14306-3 and recognize ISO 14306 as a multi-part standard.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1104Plenary
Modify target dates for ISO/TS 23301 ed2
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager modify the target date for: * Stage 20.20 (Working Draft study initiated) to 2022-11-05 * Stage 30.00 (Committee draft registered) to 2023-03-05 * Stage 60.60 (I...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1103Plenary
Appoint Convenors and Deputy Convenors for a three-year term

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1102Plenary
Establish 8-week ballot duration for new work item proposals
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to apply the 8-week ballot duration to the following NP ballots: |=== |Project |Approval |ISO/NP 10303-238 ed 4 |☒ |ISO/NP 10303-62 ed2 |☒ |ISO/NP 8000-220 |☒ |I...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1101Plenary
Approve Project Leaders and Project Editors for SC 4 Projects

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere appreciation to all the experts, delegates, and leaders for executing our first hybrid plenary meeting successfully while undergoing numerous challenges.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
